---
title: Python Example
format: live-html
---

## Simple Examples

```{pyodide}
for x in range(5):
  print(x ** 2)
```

```{pyodide}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.random.normal(170, 10, 250)
plt.hist(x)
plt.show()
```

## Exercise Example

```{pyodide}
#| exercise: ex_1_py
#| check: true
n = range(1, 11)
mean = sum(n)/len(n)
feedback = None
if (result == mean):
  feedback = { "correct": True, "message": "Nice work!" }
else:
  feedback = { "correct": False, "message": "That's incorrect, sorry." }
feedback
```

Calculate the average of all of the integers from 1 to 10.

```{pyodide}
#| exercise: ex_1_py
n = range(1, 11)
______
```
